info.title: Orbis API
info.description: Public API for Orbis CRM — enrichment, contacts, companies, and more.

get.description: Full-text search across all companies in ES. Add semantic=true for hybrid search.

post.description: Lookup + auto-enrich a company. 200 if cached, 202 if triggered.

get.description: Get enriched company profile by domain (100+ fields).
Full-text search across people in ES. Add semantic=true for hybrid search.

post.description: Lookup + auto-enrich a person (by name, email, LinkedIn, etc.).

get.description: Get enriched person profile by person_id (50+ fields).

post.description: Create a contact (deduplicates by email then name match).

get.description: Get contact detail. ?include=enrichment fetches full ES person doc.

patch.description: Update contact fields. Routes to correct table (shared vs user-scoped).

delete.description: Remove user's relationship to this contact (NOT the shared contact record).

get.description: List email threads with this contact.
List calendar events involving this contact.
List tasks linked to this contact.

post.description: Add a company to the org.

get.description: Get company detail. ?include=enrichment fetches full ES company doc.

patch.description: Update org relationship fields (NOT the shared company record).

delete.description: Remove org's relationship (NOT the company record or ES doc).

get.description: List interactions with contacts at this company.
List tasks linked to this company.

post.description: Global search across contacts, companies, notes, interactions, threads.

get.description: Get thread with full message content.

post.description: Create a Google Calendar event (proxies to calendar-events edge function).
Add contacts and trigger AI draft generation.

get.description: List campaign contacts with draft status.

post.description: Send a new email via Gmail.
Create a task on a board.
Add a comment to a task.
Add a skill to the agent.

delete.description: Remove a skill from the agent.

DataListResponse.title: DataListResponse
DataListResponse.description: List of resources without pagination meta.

DataResponse.title: DataResponse
DataResponse.description: Single resource wrapped in data envelope.

EnrichmentCompanySearchResponse.title: EnrichmentCompanySearchResponse
EnrichmentCompanySearchResponse.description: Search results from ES company index.

EnrichmentPersonSearchResponse.title: EnrichmentPersonSearchResponse
EnrichmentPersonSearchResponse.description: Search results from ES person index.

ProxyResponse.title: ProxyResponse
ProxyResponse.description: Response from edge function proxy (shape varies).
